Failing test: "loyalty discount 20% for customer with 2+ years" — expects 95
Current error: Expected 95, received 115
Passing tests so far: 13

Customer is `{yearsWithMHPCO: 2}`. Loyalty discount applies when yearsWithMHPCO >= 2: subtract 20% of policy base.

Computation: 100 base + 10 first ins (10%) - 20 loyalty (20%) = 90 + 5 fee = 95.

Add minimal loyalty discount. Read `scenario.customer.yearsWithMHPCO`. Apply -20% on policy base when >= 2.

Working dir: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_22-57-53_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking

content.text:
All 14 tests pass (was 13, now +1 for the loyalty test).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_RATE` (0.2) and `LOYALTY_THRESHOLD_YEARS` (2) constants. Read `scenario.customer.yearsWithMHPCO` and subtract 20% of base premium when years >= 2.
- Result: All 14 tests now pass (18 todo remaining).
- Approach: Minimal — used a simple conditional that returns 0 discount when threshold not met, otherwise applies the 20% rate against the base premium. No premature generalization; just enough to make the new test green while keeping the 13 previously passing tests green.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_22-57-53_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
